ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The starting position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The ending position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand of the DNA (positive or negative) */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* A brief description of the gene's function */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in gene information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypes" (
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenotype */,
  "phenotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the phenotype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phenotype */,
  "plant_part" TEXT /* The part of the plant where the phenotype is observed */,
  "trait_type" TEXT /* The type of trait (e.g., morphological, physiological) */,
  "measurement_units" TEXT /* Units used to measure the phenotype */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in phenotype information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phenotype record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the phenotype record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_phenotype_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being studied */,
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phenotype being observed */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene in relation to the phenotype */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset where the data was collected */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene expression was measured */,
  "experiment_id" TEXT /* ID of the experiment in which the data was collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_phenotype_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_phenotype_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_phenotype_data_phenotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("phenotype_id") REFERENCES phenotypes ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant species */,
  "cultivar" TEXT /* Cultivar of the plant */,
  "growth_environment" TEXT /* Growth environment for the plant */,
  "genetic_marker" TEXT /* Specific genetic markers associated with the plant */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Current growth stage of the plant */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed environmental conditions */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in plant information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the plant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant from which the data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., genomic, phenotypic) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, FASTQ) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
